title: WAF CORS Bypass Attempt Blocked
description: Detects CORS misconfiguration exploitation attempts where attackers try to bypass cross-origin restrictions. OWASP A05:2021 Security Misconfiguration.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and (('Request Headers' like '*Origin: null*' or 'Request Headers' like '*Origin: http://evil*' or 'Request Headers' like '*Origin: https://evil*' or 'Request Headers' like '*Origin: http://attacker*' or 'Request Headers' like '*Access-Control-Allow-Origin: **')))
falsepositives: Mobile apps with custom origin headers
